title: Ability to paste an image into a form
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: Myron (Myron Szymanskyj)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

For someone to be able to paste an image from the clipboard into a form without having to save it to a file first and then uploading it.

What are you trying to achieve

Quite a number of people who I support are finding it cumbersome to have to capture an image, put in in snip & sketch, save it to a file and then upload it to a monday.com.

it would be a lit easier to be able to copy an area of the screen and simply paste it into a form.

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Myron you can now do this with SuperForm’s new widget feature.

You can now insert:
Images
Text sections
Videos
Dividers
iFrames
and more…directly into your SuperForm

Use widgets to:
Explain what each part of the form is for
Group related questions together
Embed extra info (like a help page, product list, or schedule) right inside the form

Check it out for yourself. Try SuperForm.
